description_long: This is a large, modern hiking or urban backpack with a sleek, technical design. The main body is constructed from a dark, ripstop synthetic fabric, with a glossy black top section and reinforced bottom. Red accent stitching and zigzag bungee cords add both visual interest and utility to the front and sides. The back panel features three large, padded mesh sections for comfort and ventilation, and the shoulder straps are ergonomically shaped with visible mesh padding. There is a prominent front pocket with a zipper, and additional zippers are visible on the top and bottom, suggesting multiple compartments. The overall appearance is robust and functional, suitable for carrying heavy loads in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A large, dark technical backpack with red accent stitching, mesh-padded straps and back, and multiple zippered compartments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main compartment, a large zippered front pocket, red bungee cord, and a small brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the bag, side bungee cord, and the ergonomic shoulder strap with mesh padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays three large mesh-padded back panels and both shoulder straps, emphasizing comfort and support.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side bungee cord and the structure of the shoulder strap.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular logo with the text 'KUBAN' in white, located on the upper left of the front pocket, approximately 4 cm wide.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh padding; no visible chest or waist strap.
attribute_zipper_placement: One zipper at the top for the main compartment, one horizontal zipper on the front pocket, and one zipper at the bottom for a lower compartment.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One large main compartment, one large front zippered pocket, and one lower zippered compartment; no visible side or mesh pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Red zigzag bungee cords on the front and sides, contrasting red stitching, and a small brand logo patch.
